category_sources: source_facts.description says console carddav client; official GitHub README describes khard as an address book for the Unix console that manages vCard address book entries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are khard; official GitHub repository is lucc/khard.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links khard.readthedocs.io/en/latest as the project documentation and says further instructions are in the documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; official GitHub result identifies lucc/khard as khard's development repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states console CardDAV client; official GitHub README references vCard address book entries and console address book usage.
